source_spans.text: This increase in abundance was achieved by controlling sea lampreys Petromyzon marinus (1960)

nodes.name: relative abundance of wild spawning lake trout

source_spans.text: Since 1988, the relative abundance of wild spawning lake trout has increased in Parry Sound.
stocking yearling lake trout derived from the remnant stock (1981±1997)
creating a refuge (1987)
restricting harvest by reducing both angling seasons and possession limits (1981)
imposing a size limit for retention (1994)
Regulation changes in 1994 had an immediate effect on the lake trout fishery.
Summer fishing effort was reduced by one-half
harvest by two-thirds
The establishment of the refuge near Davy Island in 1987
increased index of spawner abundance after 1990
Fishery restrictions and harvest assessment
reduce angling mortality

nodes.name: introduction of hatchery-reared yearling lake trout

source_spans.text: Following the introduction of hatchery-reared yearling lake trout
natural recruitment of lake trout was observed
reducing sea-lamprey-induced mortality
rehabilitation success
lake trout restoration is possible if sea lampreys are controlled

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:227d7ec60e4c
edges.original_sentence: This increase in abundance was achieved by controlling sea lampreys Petromyzon marinus (1960), stocking yearling lake trout derived from the remnant stock (1981±1997), creating a refuge (1987), restricting harvest by reducing both angling seasons and possession limits (1981), and imposing a size limit for retention (1994).

source_spans.text: This increase in abundance was achieved by controlling sea lampreys Petromyzon marinus (1960), stocking yearling lake trout derived from the remnant stock (1981±1997), creating a refuge (1987), restricting harvest by reducing both angling seasons and possession limits (1981), and imposing a size limit for retention (1994).

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:093c316ab599
edges.original_sentence: Following the introduction of hatchery-reared yearling lake trout and the application of effective control of sea lampreys, natural recruitment of lake trout was observed in Lakes Superior, Michigan, Huron, and Ontario.

source_spans.text: Following the introduction of hatchery-reared yearling lake trout and the application of effective control of sea lampreys, natural recruitment of lake trout was observed in Lakes Superior, Michigan, Huron, and Ontario.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:98b3315907ff
edges.original_sentence: The rehabilitation success at Parry Sound was accomplished by reducing sea-lamprey-induced mortality, stocking lake trout derived from the remnant wild stock, and sufficiently restricting harvests.
